data.title: Polyglot Test Gate: stack-agnostic test runner config and gate scripts
data.description:
Introduce commands.test_runner config key and eliminate hardcoded python3/pytest references from the test gate pipeline. Onboarding auto-detects Jest/RSpec/pytest and writes the key; record-test-status.sh, record-test-exemption.sh, and reinstall-hooks.sh all read from it. Enables Ruby and JS/TS projects to use the test gate without modification.

Success Criteria:
- commands.test_runner config key defined and documented in CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md
- record-test-status.sh routes .rb files to the configured test runner (no hardcoded pytest)
- record-test-exemption.sh uses commands.test_runner instead of python3 -m pytest "$NODE_ID"
- reinstall-hooks.sh removes the hard-fail on missing pyproject.toml
- Onboarding detects Jest/RSpec/pytest and writes commands.test_runner default
- INSTALL.md updated with test runner optional dependency notes
- README.md updated to reflect polyglot test gate support
